message.content:
# Low Ratings Become Recovered Customers  
Anything under 5★ stays private and routes to AI, which turns a complaint into a fix, a win-back offer, and a team alert.  

## Routed to AI  
1-4★ is kept off public platforms and handed to AI for handling.  

## Tailored Reply + Internal Feedback  
AI captures what went wrong — tied to the service and the team member’s expertise — and replies with empathy.  

## Coupon / Discount Generated  
A win-back code or discount (sized to your business) is issued for their next service or order.  

## Team Notified  
Your team is alerted instantly with the full context so they can follow up and fix the root cause.
